zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter William de Baskerville於1209年出生在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親Walter de Baskerville30歲，母親Elizabeth Pembridge25歲。他和Susannah Crigdon至少有10個兒子。他去世於1277年在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter William de Baskerville于1209年出生在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，他的父亲Walter de Baskerville30岁，母亲Elizabeth Pembridge25岁。他和Susannah Crigdon至少有10个儿子。他去世于1277年在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter William de Baskerville was born in 1209, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter de Baskerville, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Pembridge, was 25. He had at least 10 sons with Susannah Crigdon. He died in 1277, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter William de Baskerville est né en 1209, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Baskerville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pembridge, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 10 fils avec Susannah Crigdon. Il est décédé en 1277, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter William de Baskerville 1209 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Baskerville 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Pembridge 25. Er hatte mit Susannah Crigdon mindestens 10 Söhne. Er starb 1277 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter William de Baskerville è nato il nel 1209 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Baskerville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Pembridge, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli con Susannah Crigdon. Morì nel 1277, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter William de Baskervilleが1209年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Walter de Baskervilleは30歳，母Elizabeth Pembridgeは25歳であった。彼はSusannah Crigdonとの間に少なくとも10人の息子をもうけた。彼は1277年に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter William de Baskerville(이)가 1209년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Baskerville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Pembridge(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Susannah Crigdon(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1277년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter William de Baskerville nasceu em 1209, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Baskerville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pembridge, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos com Susannah Crigdon. Ele faleceu em 1277, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter William de Baskerville родился в 1209 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Baskerville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pembridge, 25. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей от Susannah Crigdon. Он умер в 1277 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter William de Baskerville nació en 1209, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Baskerville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Pembridge, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos con Susannah Crigdon. Murió en 1277, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
